## ShNodes.ShCommandNode type

The union of concrete node types mvdan/sh's `syntax.Command` interface can hold.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type ShCommandNode =
  | ShArithmCmdNode
  | ShBinaryCmdNode
  | ShBlockNode
  | ShCallExprNode
  | ShCaseClauseNode
  | ShCoprocClauseNode
  | ShDeclClauseNode
  | ShForClauseNode
  | ShFuncDeclNode
  | ShIfClauseNode
  | ShLetClauseNode
  | ShSubshellNode
  | ShTestClauseNode
  | ShTestDeclNode
  | ShTimeClauseNode
  | ShWhileClauseNode;
```
